purpose: Approved upstream projects for future adapters and plugin integrations. Do not copy entire repositories into core.

projects.name: Grafana
projects.use: External operational dashboards and long-term telemetry visualization
projects.integrationMode: optional external service or dashboard adapter

projects.name: Apache ECharts
projects.use: Interactive timelines, heatmaps, networks, sankey and realtime charts

projects.name: MapLibre GL JS
projects.use: Advanced vector map layers and provider-neutral world rendering

projects.name: React Flow
projects.use: AI workflow, faction relation and mission graph editors

projects.name: Dockview
projects.use: IDE-style movable analytics and AI panels

projects.name: Tweakpane
projects.use: Live simulation tuning and developer controls
